name: leadership-in-turbulent-times
description: Doris Kearns Goodwin's Leadership — extract leadership lessons from Lincoln, TR, FDR, and LBJ on developing through adversity, navigating crises, building teams, and communicating vision
useCase: Helps leaders at any level understand how leadership is developed through adversity — using four presidential profiles to illustrate different styles of crisis navigation, team building, resilience, and communication.
knownRisks: Presidential leadership operates at a scale most leaders won't encounter — adapt lessons to your context
Historical analysis inevitably simplifies complex individuals
